# Browser rendering assets

These pinned browser builds are embedded into exported conversation HTML so
Markdown tables and Mermaid diagrams work without a network connection.

- Marked 18.0.7: `marked-18.0.7.umd.js`, MIT
- DOMPurify 3.4.12: `dompurify-3.4.12.min.js`, Apache-2.0
- Mermaid 11.16.0: `mermaid-11.16.0.min.js`, MIT

The corresponding license text is stored beside each build. Source releases:

- https://github.com/markedjs/marked/releases/tag/v18.0.7
- https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify/releases/tag/3.4.12
- https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/mermaid%4011.16.0
